name: Block, Inc.
business: Block, Inc. operates connected ecosystems including Square commerce solutions for sellers, Cash App financial services for consumers, TIDAL music platform for artists, and Bitcoin ecosystem with self-custody wallet, mining hardware, and open-source contributions. Square provides payment processing, software, hardware, and lending to small and mid-market businesses. Cash App offers peer-to-peer payments, debit card, BNPL, stock brokerage, bitcoin trading, and lending to individuals.

exposures.sentence: We apply data, automation, and AI to improve the speed, accuracy, and usability of our products.

Our bitcoin ecosystem includes our bitcoin hardware projects, which include Bitkey, which is a self-custody bitcoin wallet, Proto, which is a bitcoin mining system, as well as Spiral, an independent team focused on contributing to bitcoin open source work.

Through the use of our BNPL products, consumers can split their purchases into generally three or four installments, typically due in two-week increments, without paying fees (if payments are made on time).
Cash App's foundation is its customer networks that engage with each other through peer to peer functionality.
Square Loans facilitates loans to qualified Square sellers through Square Financial Services.

catalysts.event: Workforce reduction restructuring plan designed to better align organizational structure with operating model and strategic priorities; expected to reduce workforce by more than 40% and be substantially complete by end of Q2 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026 we announced a workforce reduction restructuring plan (the Workforce Plan ) designed to better align our organizational structure with our operating model and strategic priorities.
